tldr_zh: Google DeepMind發布文本生成加速模型、OpenAI揭露中國影響力行動、加拿大擬禁16歲以下使用社交媒體。
tldr_en: Google DeepMind releases 4x faster text generation model, OpenAI reveals Chinese influence ops, Canada proposes banning social media for under-16s.

items.title_zh: Google DeepMind推出DiffusionGemma模型，文本生成速度提升4倍
items.title_en: Google DeepMind Releases DiffusionGemma with 4x Faster Text Generation
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind發布新型AI模型DiffusionGemma，採用擴散技術實現文本生成速度提升4倍。該技術首次將擴散方法應用於文本生成，過去擴散技術主要用於影像生成，這項突破有助於提升語言模型的執行效率。
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind introduced DiffusionGemma, a new model that uses diffusion techniques to achieve 4x faster text generation. This marks the first application of diffusion methods to text generation, with the technology traditionally used for image generation, significantly improving language model efficiency.

items.title_zh: OpenAI揭露中國相關影響力行動瞄準美國AI辯論
items.title_en: OpenAI Exposes PRC-Linked Influence Operations Targeting US AI Debates
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發布報告指控中國相關勢力利用AI技術進行影響力行動，針對美國科技辯論、數據中心論述、關稅政策和ChatGPT虛假聲稱進行操縱。此報告揭示地緣政治對抗已延伸至AI輿論領域，成為國家級網絡戰的新戰場。
items.summary_en: OpenAI published a report detailing PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target US tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT. The report reveals geopolitical competition has extended to AI discourse, becoming a new frontier in state-sponsored information warfare.

items.title_zh: 加拿大提出《安全社交媒體法》禁止16歲以下青少年使用
items.title_en: Canada Proposes Safe Social Media Act Banning Users Under 16
items.summary_zh: 加拿大政府提出《安全社交媒體法》，擬禁止16歲以下青少年使用社交媒體，並首次將AI聊天機器人納入數位安全監管框架。此舉代表政府對青少年數位安全的重視，以及對生成式AI風險管理的新思考。
items.summary_en: Canada's government proposed the Safe Social Media Act, which would ban users under 16 from accessing social media platforms and brings AI chatbots under digital safety regulations for the first time. This represents a significant step in protecting youth online safety and managing generative AI risks.

items.title_zh: OpenAI支持歐盟AI內容透明度守則，推進AI內容溯源標準
items.title_en: OpenAI Supports EU Code of Practice on AI Content Transparency
items.summary_zh: OpenAI宣布支持歐盟《AI內容透明度行為準則》，推進AI生成內容的溯源標準與工具開發。此舉有助於提升公眾對AI生成內容的理解，建立更可信的AI生態系統。
items.summary_en: OpenAI announced support for the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools for AI-generated content. This initiative helps the public better understand AI-generated materials and builds a more trustworthy AI ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 台灣NCC發布新聞AI應用指引，要求全程揭露和人工查核
items.title_en: Taiwan's NCC Releases AI Journalism Guidelines Requiring Full Disclosure and Human Verification
items.summary_zh: 台灣通訊傳播委員會（NCC）發布《廣電媒體製播新聞應用AI指引》，要求媒體建立人工查證機制、全程揭露AI生成內容，並避免在重大報導中使用高度擬真的AI影音。此指引針對新聞製播的AI應用風險進行管理。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's NCC released guidelines for AI applications in broadcast news, requiring media to establish human verification mechanisms, fully disclose AI-generated content, and avoid highly realistic AI video/audio in major news coverage. These guidelines address risk management in AI-powered news production.

items.title_zh: 研究揭示AI代理易遭社交工程欺騙，可被誘導洩露敏感資料
items.title_en: Research Reveals AI Agents Vulnerable to Social Engineering and Phishing
items.summary_zh: 資安廠商Varonis研究發現，OpenClaw開源AI代理平臺的AI代理雖設有安全政策，仍可被攻擊者透過社交工程手法誘騙而洩露敏感資訊。此研究指出AI代理面臨與真人員工相同的安全威脅，企業須重新評估AI代理部署的安全策略。
items.summary_en: Varonis security research found that AI agents on the OpenClaw platform can be deceived through social engineering and phishing despite security policies in place. The study shows AI agents face similar threats as human employees, requiring organizations to reassess security strategies for AI agent deployment.

items.title_zh: Microsoft Xbox部門面臨大規模裁員，暗示工作室可能關閉
items.title_en: Microsoft Xbox Division Faces Major Layoffs with Possible Studio Closures
items.summary_zh: 微軟Xbox部門將在下月進行大規模裁員，CEO Asha Sharma先前暗示要做出「艱難抉擇」。據報道，裁員可能涉及工作室關閉或業務調整，這是Xbox部門的重大人事變動。
items.summary_en: Microsoft's Xbox division will face significant layoffs next month. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma previously hinted at making "hard choices." Reports suggest the cuts could involve studio closures or business restructuring, marking a major shift for the division.

items.title_zh: 美國法院裁定無人需要AI搜尋，Google AI Overview在德國敗訴
items.title_en: German Court Rules Against Google AI Search, Says No One Needs AI Overview
items.summary_zh: 德國法院針對Google AI Overview進行裁決，認為消費者無需AI搜尋功能。此判決可能對整個AI搜尋產業產生重大影響，質疑AI搜尋的實際必要性和市場前景。
items.summary_en: A German court ruled against Google's AI Overview search feature, determining that consumers don't need AI-powered search. This decision could have significant implications for the entire AI search industry, questioning the necessity and market viability of AI search products.

items.title_zh: 華納音樂收購Sureel強化AI時代的音樂版權追蹤
items.title_en: Warner Music Acquires Sureel to Enhance AI-Era Music Copyright Tracking
items.summary_zh: 華納音樂集團收購AI版權追蹤新創公司Sureel，利用其AI DNA技術追蹤歌曲和藝人聲音在AI訓練和生成內容中的使用。此舉加強了音樂產業在AI時代的版權管理、權利歸屬和收益分配能力。
items.summary_en: Warner Music Group acquired AI copyright tracking startup Sureel to enhance its ability to track how songs and artist voices are used in AI model training and generated content. This strengthens music industry copyright management, rights attribution, and revenue distribution in the AI era.

items.title_zh: 蘋果新Siri AI已上線，以簡潔風格與冗長AI聊天機器人有所區隔
items.title_en: Apple's New Siri AI Launches with Concise Personality, Differs from Verbose Chatbots
items.summary_zh: 蘋果新版Siri AI已正式推出，相比其他AI聊天機器人的冗長和過度友善風格，新Siri以簡潔有力的溝通方式獲得好評。這種差異化設計反映了蘋果對用戶體驗的不同理解。
items.summary_en: Apple's new Siri AI has launched with a notably concise personality that distinguishes it from verbose and overly cheerful AI chatbots. This differentiated design reflects Apple's distinct approach to user experience in AI assistants.

items.title_zh: 美伊中東衝突升級，兩國連續兩日相互攻擊交換火力
items.title_en: US and Iran Exchange Strikes for Second Consecutive Day in Middle East Escalation
items.summary_zh: 伊朗聲稱對美軍轟炸作出回應，針對威脅美國資產的科威特、約旦和巴林目標進行襲擊，巴林首都遭受損害。美伊衝突升級為連續兩日相互攻擊，中東局勢趨於緊張。
items.summary_en: Iran responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan, and Bahrain, with damage reported in Bahrain's capital. The escalating US-Iran conflict marks the second consecutive day of mutual strikes, heightening Middle East tensions.

items.title_zh: 北韓駭客佔美國科技業駭客攻擊近半，遠超中俄威脅
items.title_en: North Korean Hackers Account for Nearly Half of US Tech Industry Attacks, CrowdStrike Reports
items.summary_zh: 網路安全公司CrowdStrike報告指出，北韓駭客在過去12個月內發動了美國科技業近一半的攻擊，他們偽裝成遠端IT員工和招聘者。此數據突顯北韓在網路戰中的重要角色，威脅程度超越預期。
items.summary_en: CrowdStrike reports that North Korean hackers account for approximately half of all US tech industry attacks over the past 12 months, posing as remote IT workers and recruiters. This data highlights North Korea's significant role in cyber warfare, exceeding previous threat assessments.
